description: Mr. Hemraj Sharma lost his son to a drunk driving accident on 4th April, 2016. Watch what he does to stop this from happening to someone else.

comments.text: I like this. It means a lot.
comments.author: @britishmemes

comments.text: sir.  you are doing a great job. may lord almighty always be with you and your family

comments.text: love you uncle! hope ur family can come out of this grief. what u have shown us is a wake up call.

comments.text: And then there are people who can even dislike this. I have thought for at least 30 mins, and was not able to find why would someone dislike this. Still clueless, willing to get some answers.
